Let S = sum of the remaining 8 angles. Then total sum = S + 160°. 5. But the total sum of interior angles of any nonagon is fixed at 1260°, regardless of regularity. So S + 160° = 1260°. 6. Therefore S = 1260° - 160° = 1100°. 7. Check options: 1100° is option A.
